sentences.target: Ich liebe die Freiheit am Wochenende.

translations.de: Ich liebe die Freiheit am Wochenende.
translations.en: I love the freedom on weekends.
translations.es: Me encanta la libertad de los fines de semana.
translations.it: Adoro la libertà del fine settimana.
translations.pt: Adoro a liberdade dos fins de semana.
translations.he: אני אוהב את החופש בסופי השבוע.
translations.vi: Tôi thích sự tự do vào cuối tuần.
translations.nl: Ik hou van de vrijheid in het weekend.
translations.hi: मुझे वीकेंड की आज़ादी बहुत पसंद है.
translations.id: Saya suka kebebasan di akhir pekan.
translations.ja: 週末の自由が大好きだ。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the finite verb.
Finite main verb, 1st person singular present indicative; selects a direct object in the accusative.
Definite article agreeing with a feminine singular noun in accusative case.
Common noun, feminine; here accusative singular as the direct object of 'liebe'.
Preposition governing dative in this temporal PP; part of the contraction 'am' = 'an dem'.
Definite article, dative singular neuter; pairs with 'Wochenende' in the PP 'an dem Wochenende'.
Common noun, neuter; dative singular as object of the preposition 'an' in a temporal PP.

sentences.target: Endlich habe ich wieder meine Freiheit.

translations.de: Endlich habe ich wieder meine Freiheit.
translations.en: Finally I have my freedom again.
translations.es: Por fin vuelvo a ser libre.
translations.fr: Enfin, je suis à nouveau libre.
translations.it: Finalmente ho di nuovo la mia libertà.
translations.he: סוף סוף יש לי שוב את החופש שלי.
translations.vi: Cuối cùng tôi lại được tự do.
translations.nl: Eindelijk heb ik mijn vrijheid weer.
translations.hi: आखिरकार मैं फिर से आज़ाद हूँ.
translations.da: Endelig har jeg min frihed igen.
translations.ja: やっとまた自由になれた。

tokens.explanation: Sentence adverb expressing speaker attitude/time frame; modifies the whole proposition.
Finite main verb (not auxiliary here), 1st person singular present; denotes possession.
Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject following verb due to V2 word order.
Adverb meaning 'again'; modifies the verb phrase.
Possessive determiner, feminine singular accusative; agrees with 'Freiheit'.
Common noun, feminine; accusative singular as direct object of 'habe'.

sentences.target: Im Ausland fühle ich mehr Freiheit.

translations.de: Im Ausland fühle ich mehr Freiheit.
translations.es: En el extranjero me siento más libre.
translations.fr: À l'étranger, je me sens plus libre.
translations.ru: За границей я чувствую себя свободнее.
translations.pt: No exterior eu me sinto mais livre.
translations.vi: Ở nước ngoài tôi cảm thấy tự do hơn.
translations.nl: In het buitenland voel ik me vrijer.
translations.hi: विदेश में मुझे ज्यादा आज़ादी महसूस होती है.
translations.nb: I utlandet føler jeg meg friere.
translations.id: Di luar negeri aku merasa lebih bebas.
translations.ro: În străinătate am mai multă libertate.
translations.da: I udlandet føler jeg mig friere.
translations.ja: 海外にいるともっと自由に感じる。

tokens.explanation: Preposition taking dative for static location; part of the contraction 'im' = 'in dem'.
Definite article, dative singular neuter; completes the PP 'in dem Ausland'.
Common noun, neuter; dative singular as complement of 'in' denoting location.
Finite main verb, 1st person singular present; takes an object expressing what is felt.
Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of 'fühle'.
Quantifying determiner used prenominally, modifying the following noun ('Freiheit') without an article.
Common noun, feminine; accusative singular as the object of 'fühle', quantified by 'mehr'.

sentences.target: Tom findet Freiheit beim Klettern in der Halle.
sentences.reading: /tɔm ˈfɪndət ˈfʁaɪ̯haɪ̯t baɪ̯m ˈklɛtɐn ɪn deːɐ̯ ˈhalə/

translations.de: Tom findet Freiheit beim Klettern in der Halle.
translations.ipa: /tɔm ˈfɪndət ˈfʁaɪ̯haɪ̯t baɪ̯m ˈklɛtɐn ɪn deːɐ̯ ˈhalə/
translations.en: Tom finds freedom while climbing in the gym.
translations.es: Tom se siente libre cuando escala en el rocódromo.
translations.fr: Tom se sent libre quand il grimpe en salle.
translations.it: Tom si sente libero quando arrampica in palestra.
translations.ko: 톰은 실내 암벽장에서 클라이밍할 때 자유를 느낀다.
translations.zh-Hans: 汤姆在攀岩馆攀岩时感到自由。
translations.yue: 湯姆喺攀石館攀爬時覺得好自由。
translations.ru: Том чувствует свободу, когда занимается скалолазанием в зале.
translations.pt: Tom sente-se livre quando escala no ginásio de escalada.
translations.he: טום מרגיש חופשי כשהוא מטפס באולם טיפוס.
translations.tr: Tom, tırmanış salonunda tırmanırken özgür hissediyor.
translations.vi: Tom thấy tự do khi leo ở phòng leo núi trong nhà.
translations.ar: توم يشعر بالحرية عندما يتسلق في صالة التسلق.
translations.nl: Tom voelt zich vrij als hij klimt in de klimhal.
translations.uk: Том відчуває свободу, коли займається скелелазінням у скеледромі.
translations.hu: Tom szabadnak érzi magát, amikor a mászóteremben mászik.
translations.hi: टॉम जिम में क्लाइंबिंग करते समय खुद को आज़ाद महसूस करता है.
translations.pl: Tom czuje się wolny, gdy wspina się na ściance w hali.
translations.el: Ο Τομ νιώθει ελευθερία όταν σκαρφαλώνει στο αναρριχητήριο.
translations.nb: Tom føler seg fri når han klatrer i klatrehallen.
translations.id: Tom merasa bebas saat memanjat di gym panjat tebing.
translations.sv: Tom känner sig fri när han klättrar i klätterhallen.
translations.ro: Tom se simte liber când se cațără în sala de escaladă.
translations.cs: Tom se cítí svobodný, když leze v lezecké hale.
translations.da: Tom føler frihed, når han klatrer i klatrehallen.
translations.ja: トムはクライミングジムで登っていると自由を感じる。

tokens.explanation: Proper noun; nominative singular subject.
Finite main verb, 3rd person singular present; transitive, selecting a direct object.
Common noun, feminine; accusative singular as direct object of 'findet'.
Preposition governing dative, marking circumstance ('bei dem Klettern'); part of the contraction 'beim' = 'bei dem'.
Definite article, dative singular neuter; with the nominalized verb 'Klettern' after 'bei'.
Nominalized verb used as a neuter noun; dative singular as complement of 'bei'.
Preposition with dative expressing static location.
Definite article, dative singular feminine; agrees with 'Halle'.
Common noun, feminine; dative singular as complement of 'in' (location).

en: I love the freedom on weekends.
Finally I have my freedom again.
